Title: Lemon Drop Martini Kit
Body HTML:
Sunshine in a box. Our Lemon Drop Martini Kit pairs everything you need to shake up the brightest, most sippable cocktail in the room — zesty, a little sweet, impossibly cheerful.

Comes in two ways: the classic kit with vodka and limoncello, or a zero-proof version that tastes just as bright with none of the buzz. Either way, it arrives ready to pour, ready to celebrate.

Perfect for: birthdays, girls’ night, “you deserve this” moments, or just because.

Title: Flavored Margarita Trio
Body HTML:
Why pick one margarita when you can have three? Strawberry, mango, and a classic lime walk into a gift box — add the rim salt, grab the glasses, and your at-home margarita bar is officially open.

Choose the kit with mini tequila or go zero-proof; both bring the same fiesta energy. Made for sharing, impossible to mess up.

Perfect for: taco nights, summer celebrations, and anyone whose love language is “another round.”

Title: Cosmopolitan Cocktail Kit
Body HTML:
The drink that never goes out of style. Our Cosmopolitan Kit brings the girls’-night staple straight to their door — vodka, cranberry, and a squeeze of lime, all set to shake into something gorgeous and pink.

Available with or without the alcohol, so everyone at the table gets the full glamour. Cheers, darling.

Perfect for: celebrations, reunions, and toasting the main character (that’s them).

Title: Rosé All Day Set
Body HTML:
Rosé all day, gifting done right. A beautiful bottle of rosé, a handful of nibbles to match, and glasses to make it feel like an occasion — because it is.

It’s the gift that says “let’s slow down and enjoy this,” whether the occasion is a big one or just a Tuesday that needs rescuing.

Perfect for: housewarmings, thank-yous, bridal showers, and the friend who runs on rosé.

Title: White Wine & Cheese Set
Body HTML:
A crisp, chilled white wine meets a spread of gourmet cheese and crackers — the pairing that makes any evening feel a little more put-together.

Thoughtfully boxed and ready to gift, it’s an effortless way to send “treat yourself” to someone who’d never do it on their own.

Perfect for: hostess gifts, congratulations, and cozy nights in.

Title: Champagne & Chocolate Celebration
Body HTML:
When the moment calls for a little sparkle. A bottle of bubbly paired with melt-in-your-mouth chocolate truffles — our most celebration-ready gift, made for the news worth toasting.

Elegant enough for the big milestones, indulgent enough to feel like a genuine treat. Pop, pour, celebrate.

Perfect for: birthdays, engagements, promotions, and “we did it!” moments of every size.

Title: Mimosa Brunch Kit
Body HTML:
Brunch, delivered. Bubbly plus bright, juicy mixers and a pair of flutes — everything needed to turn a lazy morning into a celebration before noon.

Prefer no alcohol? There’s a non-alc swap that’s every bit as festive. Mimosas optional, good mood guaranteed.

Perfect for: Mother’s Day, baby showers, lazy Sundays, and brunch crews everywhere.

Title: The Chocoholic Box
Body HTML:
For the one who saves room for dessert first. A box stacked with the good stuff — rich, indulgent chocolate in every form — and not a drop of alcohol in sight.

It ships anywhere, needs no signature, and lands like a hug. Sometimes the sweetest gifts really are the simplest.

Perfect for: long-distance love, thank-yous, get-wells, and serious chocolate people.

Title: Sparkling & Sweet (Zero-Proof)
Body HTML:
All the celebration, zero proof. Sparkling zero-proof bubbly paired with sweet little treats — so everyone gets to raise a glass, no exceptions.

Designed to ship anywhere with none of the alcohol restrictions, it’s the inclusive toast that never leaves anyone out.

Perfect for: expecting moms, designated drivers, dry-county deliveries, and anyone who celebrates alcohol-free.

Title: Self-Care & Sip
Body HTML:
Permission to slow down, in a box. A soothing tea, a hand-poured candle, a little chocolate, and a mini bottle of wine (or a zero-proof swap) — the whole “treat yourself” evening, ready to gift.

It’s the gift for the person who takes care of everyone else and forgets to take care of themselves.

Perfect for: burnout rescues, birthdays, thank-yous, and well-deserved nights off.

Title: Vodka Martini Gift Set
Body HTML:
Clean, classic, and seriously elegant. Everything needed to mix a crisp vodka martini at home — shaken or stirred, always sophisticated.

A timeless gift for the person with timeless taste. Arrives beautifully boxed and ready to impress.

Perfect for: milestone birthdays, congratulations, and the friend who orders it “extra dry.”

Title: Moscow Mule Gift Set
Body HTML:
The cocktail that comes with its own showstopper. Our Moscow Mule Set brings the spicy-ginger classic together with the gleaming copper mug that makes it iconic.

Refreshing, fizzy, and endlessly photogenic — a gift that looks as good as it tastes.

Perfect for: housewarmings, cocktail lovers, and anyone who appreciates a little copper sparkle.

Title: Bloody Mary Gift Set
Body HTML:
Brunch’s boldest player. A savory, spicy Bloody Mary kit with everything needed to build the ultimate morning-after masterpiece — garnish ambitions encouraged.

Available with or without the alcohol, it’s the brunch crossover gift that earns its spot on the table.

Perfect for: brunch enthusiasts, game days, and the friend who treats garnishes as a food group.

Title: Classic Gin & Tonic Set
Body HTML:
Crisp, botanical, and endlessly refreshing. Our Classic Gin & Tonic Set has everything for the cleanest, most thirst-quenching pour of the season.

Simple, elegant, and always in style — a gift for the person who knows exactly what they like.

Perfect for: summer celebrations, thank-yous, and devoted G&T loyalists.
